GG0130G2_LWR_DRSNG_GOAL_CD GG0130G2 Self Care: Lower Body Dressing Goal by Discharge Indicates the patient's goal to dress below the waist by discharge. 06. Independent – Patient completes the activity by him/herself with no assistance from a helper.
